questions.q: Read the following passage and write a report on the main points made in the passage.
questions.answer: The report should include the main points made in the passage, such as the importance of regular exercise, the benefits of yoga, and the need to make healthy lifestyle choices.

questions.q: Write a report on the following topic: 'The Impact of Social Media on Society'.
questions.answer: The report should include the effects of social media on individuals and society as a whole, including the benefits and drawbacks.

questions.q: Choose the correct answer: Write a report on the following topic: 'The Importance of Environmental Conservation'.
questions.answer: The report should include the reasons why environmental conservation is important, such as the need to protect natural resources and prevent pollution.

questions.q: Write a report on the following topic: 'The Role of Education in Society'.
questions.answer: The report should include the ways in which education benefits individuals and society as a whole, including the importance of literacy and critical thinking.

questions.q: Fill in the blanks: Write a report on the following topic: 'The Impact of Globalization on the Economy'.
questions.answer: The report should include the effects of globalization on the economy, such as the creation of jobs and the increase in trade.

Write a report on the following topic: 'The Importance of Time Management in Personal and Professional Life'.

questions.answer: The report should include the effects of technology on individuals and society as a whole, including the benefits and drawbacks.

questions.q: Write a report on the following topic: 'The Role of Women in Society'.
questions.answer: The report should include the ways in which women contribute to society, including their roles in education, employment, and family.

questions.q: Fill in the blanks: Write a report on the following topic: 'The Impact of Climate Change on the Environment'.
questions.answer: The report should include the effects of climate change on the environment, such as the increase in temperature and the decrease in biodiversity.
